mapper.sql: inventory_log_id, inventory_id, quantity, voucher_code, voucher_type, order_no, item_no, modelno, invoice_no, warehouse_code, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, type, property_id, inventory_table_type
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_log (inventory_log_id, inventory_id, quantity, voucher_code, voucher_type, order_no, item_no, modelno, invoice_no, warehouse_code, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, type, property_id, inventory_table_type) values (#{inventoryLogId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voucherType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=BIT}, #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_log
inventory_log_id,
inventory_id,
quantity,
voucher_code,
voucher_type,
order_no,

invoice_no,
warehouse_code,
version,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,

modifier,
type,

inventory_table_type,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_log
inventory_log_id = #{record.inventoryLogId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
voucher_code = #{record.voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
voucher_type = #{record.voucherType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=BIT},
property_id = #{record.propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_inventory_log set inventory_log_id = #{record.inventoryLogId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, voucher_code = #{record.voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, voucher_type = #{record.voucherType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=BIT}, property_id = #{record.propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventory_table_type = #{record.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_log
inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
voucher_code = #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
voucher_type = #{voucherType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=BIT},
property_id = #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventory_table_type = #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where inventory_log_id = #{inventoryLogId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_log set inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, voucher_code = #{voucherCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, voucher_type = #{voucherType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=BIT}, property_id = #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventory_table_type = #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where inventory_log_id = #{inventoryLogId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
